programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Animated sitcom. Lois wins a juice drink contest and uses her winnings to take Meg on a tropical holiday where they flaunt their wealth and get abducted.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Stan and Hayley collect data for the US census, but things get competitive. Klaus gets a new camera and asks Steve and his friends to model for him.

programs.title: American Dad!
programs.desc: Roger and Klaus begin a secret affair after accidentally going on an online date. Elsewhere, Steve tries to catch Hayley's pink eye to avoid a school fitness test.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Animated comedy. When Gene becomes obsessed with an old handheld game, Bob offers to help him with a school project that is all about growing vegetables.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: The family weave three fantastic tales about key events in Bob's father's life as they wait for him to arrive for a dinner with them.

programs.title: G'wed
programs.desc: Comedy series set in Liverpool. It's Diversity and Inclusion Week and the pupils are set the task of pairing up with their polar opposite for a presentation.
